examples: Jotting down all bites is the top predictor of weight loss.
There is nothing wrong with jotting down speaking notes as a memory aid.
I find jotting down a few things I want to do, should do, or could do, works best for me.
So I jumped in the pool, erased the whole boring mess on the white board, and started jotting.
For people who like jotting notes or sketching, the stylus alone could be a reason to buy the Note.
